text.title: AI-Assisted Requirements Elicitation Output Contract
text.summary: Defines per-requirement schema with BABOK format + transcript citations + compliance cross-check.

forbidden.pattern: requirement without evidence_citations OR citations that don't match source docs at named lines
story missing persona / capability / outcome fields
acceptance_criteria using prose format instead of Given/When/Then or scenario table
compliance_cross_check missing when engagement_id flagged as regulated domain
requirement living outside version-controlled requirements repo (Slack drafts forbidden)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Acceptance criteria may use scenario tables (multiple rows) instead of separate Given/When/Then blocks for parameterized cases.
For non-regulated domains, compliance_cross_check may be marked "N/A — non-regulated" but the field must exist.
BA may co-author the story (LLM drafts capability, BA writes persona + outcome) — model contribution is tracked in metadata.

list.item: every requirement uses persona / capability / outcome triple
every AC uses Given/When/Then (or scenario table)
every requirement has ≥ 1 transcript citation with verbatim quote
citations verified against source docs by BA
compliance cross-check completed (or marked N/A) per requirement
BA review log signed; edits captured
requirement saved in version-controlled requirements repo
